strName.description: The code name of the job, as referred to in other files.

strPSpecClient.description: PersonSpec used to spawn the client/target. Refers to entry within personspecs.json.

strIASetupClient.description: Setup interaction performed on the client when the job activates. Refers to entry within interactions.json.

strIASetupPlayer.description: Setup interaction performed on the player when the job activates. Refers to entry within interactions.json.

strIAAbandonClient.description: Interaction performed on the client when the job is abandoned. Refers to entry within interactions.json.

strIAAbandonPlayer.description: Interaction performed on the player when the job is abandoned. Refers to entry within interactions.json.

strIAFinishClient.description: Interaction performed on the client on successful completion. Refers to entry within interactions.json.

strIAFinishPlayer.description: Interaction performed on the player on successful completion. Refers to entry within interactions.json.

strIADo.description: The 'do' interaction the player picks up to perform the job. Refers to entry within interactions.json.

strLootTxt1.description: Loot table for setup-client text snippets. Refers to entry within loot.json.

strLootJobItems.description: Loot table that produces the items the job centers on. Refers to entry within loot.json.

strLootRegIDsOrigin.description: Loot table for the registration IDs at the origin. Refers to entry within loot.json.

strLootRegIDsDest.description: Loot table for the registration IDs at the destination. Refers to entry within loot.json.
